sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n68370" key="molubda/nqrwpos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">μολυβδ-άνθρωπος</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, '<sense id="n68370.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">lead-man</tr_>', symbol in Alchemy, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Zos.</author> </bibl> Alch.<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg2687.tlg001:p.117B" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">p.117B.</biblScope> </bibl>; cf. <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ἀργυράνθρωπος</foreign>.</sense> </entryFree>
